rulings.Case Title: JOVICA MAKSIMOVIC et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. RECONTRUST et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 26, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANTs BANK OF AMERICA N.A., RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend to allege an enforceable contract or a cause of action for promissory estoppel, to allege duty and to allege injury in fact. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: VICTOR TUNG VS. AMI QI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Amended Summons And Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 26, 2014, line 3. DEFENDANT AMI QI's Motion To Quash Service Of Amended Summons And Amended Complaint GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to show proper service of summons and complaint or that defendant has generally appeared in this matter warranting service by mail. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: CURTIS MELVIN et al VS. BALWANTSINGH THAKOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 26, 2014, line 5. rulings.Case Title: LY DINH NGUYEN et al VS. QUYNH-MAI TON-NU et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 26, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANTs TOAN THAT and QUYNHMAI TONNU's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 6th cause of action for fraud for Plaintiffs to allege fraud with requisite particularity as to each defendant. Demurrer is overruled as to other causes of action. Plaintiffs sufficiently allege original and modified joint venture contract and performance under the contract. Waiver is an issue of fact. Plaintiff's quiet title cause of action is based on breach of contract/fraud, which allegedly accrued in October 2011. Conversion of the re-finance funds is sufficiently alleged. Present and actual controversy is sufficiently alleged. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: FABIOLA GUDIEL et al VS. JOHN F. BRITTON et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 26, 2014, line 7. DEFENDANT JOHN BRITTON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, complaint sufficiently alleges facts to state each cause of action. Defendant and defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with CRC 3.1113. Late filed-reply is stricken. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: 1625 P, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. JACQUELINE MARENCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff 1625 Llc'S Further Responses To Request For Admissions, Set Two, Nos. 2, 5-7, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two, Nos. 1-4, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff 1625 P Llc, And Its Attorney
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 26, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANT JACQUELINE MARENCO's Motion To Compel Plaintiff 1625 Llc's Further Responses To Request For Admissions, Set Two, Nos. 2, 5-7, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two, Nos. 1-4, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff 1625 P Llc, And Its Attorney Continued to February 27. 2014. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition no later than February 25, 2014 by 4 p.m. = (501/AJR)
